name: Braised Bear
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate bear steak overnight.
2. Dry and sear on both sides in hot cooking oil or bacon grease.
3. Add garlic salt, onion salt, pepper, and chili powder.
4. Cover and simmer for 2 to 3 hours, until tender.
5. Add onions and soup.
6. Simmer for an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
7. If desired, add flour to thicken the juice for gravy.
